title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development workflows, reduce AI output errors, extend Claude capabilities with web scraping and media generation, and provide token spend visibility. Tools featured include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield MCP, Anthropic skill and security plugins, and others.
